title: IStructEEvaluationConfig
description: IStructEEvaluationConfig: Config for evaluation of climate change metrics using methodology from IStructE.

FloorArea.description: Total floor area for the project. Property has a quantity of type Area meassured in [m²].

TotalWeight.description: Total mass for the project. Property has a quantity of type Mass meassured in [kg].

A5CarbonFactor.description: Carbon factor for installation for the project. Gives an additional factor based on project cost and element weight. Property has a quantity of type ClimateChangePerQuantity meassured in [kg CO2 eq per unit].

C1CarbonFactor.description: Carbon factor for De-construction Demolition for the project. C1 for each element is computed based on this value and total floor area times elements proportional weight to the total. Property has a quantity of type ClimateChangePerQuantity meassured in [kg CO2 eq per unit].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
